label: Kill Switch Trip
description: An extended, deeper drawdown that pushes total drawdown to or beyond kill_switch_drawdown_pct (24%). This is the hard stop: the kill switch must trigger, halting all new and existing risk-increasing actions and forcing the desk reduce-only / flat.
expected_detail: total_drawdown_pct (25.0) >= kill_switch_drawdown_pct (24) -> should_trigger returns true and the kill switch fires. The total-drawdown check emits the kill-switch reason and the engine goes reduce-only / flat. This is the deepest protection and supersedes the plain throttle.
